calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Bloomfield appeared by telephone for Robert Champion (Special Administrator).

Mr. Bloomfield addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes stating that the Franchise Tax Board ("FTB") was notified on August 8, 2018, that the FTB's creditor's claim was filed on January 7, 2019, that it was rejected on January 11, 2019, that the FTB has not petitioned to take any other action, that 110 days have passed and that he feels this should not hold anything up. Mr. Bloomfield also stated that they have a hold back of $9,500.00, that the FTB sent a letter in which they are claiming that the Special Administrator would be personally liable, but they have not taken any legal action, that he would like to change the amount of the reserve to $11,000.00, and that the FTB's claim is time barred. In addition, Mr. Bloomfield apologized to the Court for placing the estate funds into his attorney-client trust account stating that he had no choice because the bond company refused to issue a bond and that the Personal Representative would have had access to those accounts with no bond, that based on interest rates and his calculations the total amount of interest that could have been earned is $237.49, that if the Court wants to surcharge his office he would suggest an amount of $120.00, that he billed for travel time to attend the hearing on sale of the real property, that he was required to appear, that he billed at one half hours($300.00) and that he is happy to reduce his fees by $1,200.00. The Petition for Settlement of First and Final Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions On The Claims Of Phyllis Nerviani And Of Robert Champion
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Instructions On The Claims Of Phyllis Nerviani And Of Robert Champion
Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Continued To Oct-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions On The Claims Of Phyllis Nerviani And Of Robert Champion
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Bloomfield appeared by telephone for Robert Champion.

The Court stated that it has no problem with Ms. Nerviani's claim for the funeral expenses, but not the subsequent expenses, that it does not have anything to substantiate that the Administrator paid the money for the repair of the roof or that it was paid as a loan. Mr. Bloomfield stated that Mr. Champion personally advanced Ms. Nerviani $2,000.00 on her claim, that when the roof needed to be done Mr. Champion paid in cash, that there are no other records other than the contractor's receipts, that Mr. Champion should be paid and that no one is refuting it. Mr. Bloomfiled also stated that there are no other background documents, that it's all in testimony, that Mr. Champion is a beneficiary and will receive 50% of the estate, that his Sister is the other beneficiary, that she is not objecting and that he believes a supplemental declaration will be in order. The Petition for Instructions on the Claims of Phylis Nerviani and Robert Champion is continued to October 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The declaration is to be filed by October 11, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions On The Claims Of Phyllis Nerviani And Of Robert Champion

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Sep-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Bloomfield appeared by telephone for Robert Champion.

The Court informed Mr. Bloomfield that it is still waiting for a petition to close the estate or a status report. Mr. Bloomfield stated that he was not aware a formal status report was required, asked if the matter could be put over for 90-days, stated that he will be able to do both and that they sold the property. Status on close of estate is continued to September 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that he needs to do one or the other.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition Of Preliminary Distribution Of $160,000, $80,000 To Each Of The Two Children Of The Decedent
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Partial Allowance Of Compensation For Ordinary Services
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1400 Park Ave. Novato, Ca 94945)
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Neil Bloomfield for Robert Champion.

The Court questions how the additional bond was calculated. Mr. Bloomfield stated that he has an affidavit and explained that the net proceeds after the tax liens and judgment liens are $97,000.00 more than the current bond. The Court instructed Counsel to file said declaration. Mr. Bloomfield also clarified the correct spelling of the buyer and stated that the agent waives notice and any defect in notice. The sale was confirmed at $560,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 16, 2017. The amount of the additional bond is to be determined upon review of the declaration. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order and the declaration).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
